products.name: Korean Glass Pastel Glaze
products.description: Beautiful iridescent glass nails with a custom translucent topcoat. Offers a pristine high-gloss finish typical of premium Seoul beauty studios. Perfect for minimalists looking for a touch of refined glamour.

reviews.author: Sokha R.
reviews.comment: Absolutely stunning! The glass shine is beautiful under Sunlight.

reviews.author: Neary L.
reviews.comment: Very high quality, gets me so many compliments.

products.name: Blush Jelly Dream
products.description: Feminine gradient pink syrup nails featuring premium rhinestone bow accents and pearl micro-beads. Perfect for elegant celebrations, festivals, or everyday luxury.

products.name: Gold Leaf Aurora Chrome
products.description: High-end chrome nail set paired with genuine gold leaf inclusions, structured dimensional gel swirls, and iridescent shells. Represents the pinnacle of handcrafted wearable nail art.

reviews.author: Sophea T.
reviews.comment: Unbelievable craftsmanship. It looks like real jewellery on my fingertips.

products.name: Matcha Latte Marble
products.description: Sage and matcha green tones blended seamlessly into customized jade quartz marble swirls, accented with delicate gold foil. Extremely chic, clean, and highly sought after.

products.name: Starlight Pearl Chrome
products.description: Premium oyster pearl finish using non-metallic safe cosmetic pigments. Gleams white, pink, and blue in different angles. A classic companion for weddings or high-ticket corporate events.

products.name: Coquette Vintage Velour
products.description: Deep burgundy wine cat-eye velvet texture combined with hand-painted vintage French ribbons and tiny pearl drop details. Rich, mysterious, and exquisitely detailed.
